Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize

Types

BufferConsumer = proc (x: openArray[char]): int
Source   Edit   
FlushBuffer = object
  data*: string
  consumer*: BufferConsumer  ## returns number of characters consumed
                             ## set to nil after returning negative
  freeBefore*: int           ## position before which we can cull the buffer
  flushPos*: int             ## position before which the buffer has been flushed
Source   Edit

    forbids: [].}

    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc callConsumer(buffer: var FlushBuffer) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer consumer is known not to be nil Source   Edit

    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer consumer is known not to be nil Source   Edit

                                        tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc endFlush(buffer: var FlushBuffer) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
signals to consumer the end of flushing, leaves remaining buffer Source   Edit   
proc finishFlush(buffer: var FlushBuffer) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
fully flushes buffer and signals end of flushing to consumer if consumer still exists Source   Edit   
proc initFlushBuffer(capacity = 16): FlushBuffer {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit

proc initFlushBuffer(file: File; capacity = 16): FlushBuffer {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
file has to last as long as the flush Source   Edit
